prose.en: Use technical controls, such as digital signatures and version control, to ensure that only authorized scripts, such as specific .ps1, and .py files are allowed to execute. Block unauthorized scripts from executing. Reassess bi-annually, or more frequently.
Technical controls, such as digital signatures and version control, are used to ensure that only authorized scripts, such as specific .ps1, and .py files are allowed to execute.
Unauthorized scripts are blocked from executing.
Authorized scripts are reassessed bi-annually, or more frequently.
